## Summary

Implemented **P1.M4.T1.S3** — `internal/prompt/payload.go` + white-box `payload_test.go`:

**payload.go** — third sibling file in the existing `internal/prompt` package:
- File-level comment (mirroring `system.go`/`internal/git/log.go`, deferring the package doc to `examples.go`)
- Unexported §17.3 constants committed VERBATIM: `rejectionHeader` (★ two lines, ends with colon ★), `rejectionBulletPrefix = "- "`, `rejectionFooter`
- `AssemblePayload(diff, instruction string, rejected []string) string` — pure builder, **D5 REFERENCE ordering** (diff FIRST): base = `<diff>\n\n<instruction>`; retry appends `+ "\n\n" + rejectionBlock(rejected)` LAST. `len(rejected)==0` covers both `nil` and `[]string{}`
- `rejectionBlock` helper: `rejectionHeader + "\n" + join(bullets, "\n") + "\n\n" + rejectionFooter` (one newline to first bullet, blank line before footer)
- Godoc cites reference_impl.md §3 + §4 D5 (the explicit diff-first decision over-ruling PRD §17.3 prose), PRD §17.3, and decisions.md §3

**payload_test.go** — 7 white-box tests covering all contract scenarios: base diff-first layout (exact `==`), empty-slice==nil, rejection-block-present (slice order, block-after-instruction, exact bytes), single-subject, block-absent-when-empty, exact `rejectionBlock` byte layout, and determinism.

**Validation** — all gates green:
- `go build`, `go vet`, `gofmt -l` (Level 1) ✅
- `go test ./internal/prompt/` — 6 new + all S1/S2 tests PASS (Level 2) ✅
- `go test ./...` — whole module green (Level 3) ✅
